headline.text: L3 ML1 C1 belt still down at window close after *01:53* call — L2 ML3 has a sensor stuck out of range until Monday, L1 water-activity meter failed and requires L2 loaner.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 S2 recovered from a glycol leak at Chicane #5 and a Cavanna 4 thermocouple failure, both cleared by 21:53. S4 completed 18 barrels of One Shot (MMK) overnight but discovered the plant's water-activity meter is not testing correctly and borrowed L2's unit. S4 also cleared a mixing-tank agitator issue during Bequet caramel.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML3 has one filler sensor out of range that cannot be reset and will need attention Monday morning. A brief flow-wrap stoppage at 18:09 cleared in 3 minutes. ML2 wrapped the shift with no issues.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 cleared a drive-sprocket misalignment, mold-heater alarm, Bosch sealing fault, and C6 belt tracking by 20:23, but C1 belt went down at 01:53 with no resolution posted. Flow-wrap cutting issues recurred overnight; maintenance saved the Cavanna recipe at 04:24 and lowered speed to 5 mpm by window close. Truffle line replaced a worn B150 sensor and reported metal dust from a roller that maintenance planned to fix overnight — no confirmation. MF Matrix had 7,095 trays held for wrong version label.

notes.text: Truffle line operators avoid correct magnet placement because chocolate overflows — Preston suggested jacketing the slide or a narrower magnet.
S4 staged to send 18 barrels of One Shot caramel to L2 for Monday morning availability.
Gustavo flagged drain under ML3 buffer tank and sweco found dirty; heavy wash completed, new 800ppm sanitizer x3/shift protocol starts Monday.

resolved.title: S2 Chicane Belt #5 glycol leak
resolved.summary: Operator noticed glycol leaking under Chicane #5; maintenance tightened all hose clamps, line stopped and cleaned.
resolved.resolution: Belt cleaned, ATP passed, chocolate tempered and running by 17:14 — "Belt ready to run" (Victor Mejia at 17:05).

resolved.title: S2 Cavanna 4 thermocouple failure
resolved.summary: Cavanna 4 alarmed on upper jaw thermocouple; line stopped at 20:32 with 29 bins of accumulated product.
resolved.resolution: Temperature cable replaced, Cavanna 3 working well, line running by 21:53 — "Cavanna 3 is working well now; we're going to run the line" (Elizabeth Hernandez).

resolved.title: S4 mixing tank agitator motor not running
resolved.summary: Agitator motor failed to run during ingredient addition on fourth batch, caused pipeline blockage; tank and pipeline washed.
resolved.resolution: Adjustments made, Bequet caramel finished and One Shot startup supported by 15:55 — board posted showing production complete (Marcos Jimenez at 15:55).

resolved.title: S2 tunnel 3 e-stop, reheat required
resolved.summary: E-stop pressed on tunnel 3, line turned off for reheat cycle.
resolved.resolution: Reheat finished by 16:31, program set — "We've finished the reheat; we've already set the program" (Elizabeth Hernandez).

resolved.title: ML3 flow wrapper stoppage
resolved.summary: Line down at 18:09 due to flow-wrap issues.
resolved.resolution: Cleared in 3 minutes — "Line start running" at 18:12 (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: Main drive sprocket off one tooth, molds scratching
resolved.summary: Drive sprocket slipped a tooth during almond clean, causing all molds to scratch against demolding hardware.
resolved.resolution: Sprocket corrected, gap created for QA inspection, passed and running at 16:39 — "We are back and running" (Imperial).

resolved.title: Truffle line B150 sensor worn, machine not starting
resolved.summary: Worn B150 sensor preventing machine from starting; 30 bins of accumulation ran out while maintenance worked.
resolved.resolution: Sensor replaced and phasing belt adjusted by 09:40 — "Replaced worn sensor wb150 and made adjustments to phasing belt" (Nathan Ruiz).

resolved.title: MF Matrix weight checker loaded wrong recipe
resolved.summary: Weight checker had incorrect recipe loaded, causing high reject rate.
resolved.resolution: Verified with QA, correct recipe loaded, approved at 15:59 — "Approved" (Angel Cabrera).

resolved.title: Mold heater overheated, blower fan failing
resolved.summary: One of four mold heaters overheated and alarmed; maintenance identified failing blower fan and adjusted fault limit to 65% duty cycle.
resolved.resolution: Fault limit increased, heater running within safe limits as of 19:13 — "It's still within safe limits for the equipment" (Preston Elmer).

resolved.title: Bosch wrapper not sealing
resolved.summary: Bosch wrapper stopped sealing, maintenance worked on-site.

resolved.title: C6 belt tracking south
resolved.summary: C6 belt drifting to south side, maintenance adjusted tracking.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 01:28 — "Start running back up" (Raoul Lubain).

needs_attention.title: S4 water activity meter not testing correctly
needs_attention.summary: L1 water-activity meter giving incorrect low readings during One Shot run; L2 meter borrowed and showing proper results.
needs_attention.status: L1 meter confirmed not testing correctly at 18:51; L2 meter in use as workaround, L1 unit requires service.

needs_attention.title: ML3 filler sensor out of range, cannot reset
needs_attention.summary: One filler sensor reading out of range; unplugging, power-down, and recipe reload all failed to clear.
needs_attention.status: Cannot reset sensor as of 06:22, flagged for Monday morning attention — Dave Ruff and Jeffrey Barney tagged.

needs_attention.title: C1 belt down
needs_attention.summary: C1 belt reported down at 01:53, maintenance called.
needs_attention.status: Down since 01:53, maintenance called, no resolution posted by window close.

needs_attention.title: Metal dust from roller between MD and next belt
needs_attention.summary: Metal dust found originating from roller between metal detector belt and subsequent belt; not compromising product, maintenance planned to fix overnight.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance stated they would resolve with changes and adjustments overnight; no confirmation of completion posted.

needs_attention.title: 7,095 trays of 41056-V1 on hold, wrong version
needs_attention.summary: MF Matrix produced 7,095 trays with version V1 label when sales team required different version.
needs_attention.status: Trays on hold as of 22:10, awaiting disposition from sales team.

needs_attention.title: Flow-wrap not cutting, recurring issue
needs_attention.summary: Recurring cutting issues on flow-wrap overnight; maintenance saved Cavanna recipe at 04:24, speed lowered to 5 mpm by 07:10.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance saved recipe at 04:24 and lowered line to 5 mpm for adjustments as of 07:10 at window close.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix bracket #14 fell off central cone
needs_attention.summary: Bracket number 14 detached from machine central cone.
needs_attention.status: Bracket fell off at 16:31, no resolution posted.
